what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG icon showing a square floor or tile pattern made from an outlined rectangle and internal grid lines.
observations: Uses a 24x24 viewBox with explicit width and height.
Draws an outer square from x=4 to x=20 and y=4 to y=20 with a slight corner radius.
Draws two horizontal and two vertical internal divider lines.
Uses fill="none" and stroke="currentColor" so the icon inherits text color.
Sets stroke width to 1.5 with round line caps and joins.
standouts: Compact single-path grid construction inside a bounded square.
conventions: Follows common inline SVG icon conventions with a 24x24 viewBox.
Uses stroke-only geometry rather than filled shapes.
Keeps geometry aligned to a simple grid-like layout.
concerns: No title or desc element is present for accessibility metadata.
Single-line SVG markup is compact but harder to scan in diffs.
notes: A themeable outline SVG asset for representing a floor or tile pattern.
questions: Should this icon be treated as decorative or given an accessible label by consumers?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename suggests a floor-pattern icon, and the SVG draws a tiled square grid matching that purpose.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a small reusable icon for floor, tile, or surface pattern controls.
contribution: Contributes a compact currentColor SVG asset that represents floor or tile patterning through a bounded grid motif.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 stroke-only SVG icon depicting a square floor-pattern grid with internal horizontal and vertical dividers.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for a reusable, themeable floor-pattern icon in a design system asset set.
